border-box; padding-left: 24px; color: rgb(26, 28, 30); font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255);" class="ng-star-inserted"><li style="box-sizing: border-box; font-optical-sizing: auto; line-height: 20px;" class="ng-star-inserted"><p style="box-sizing: border-box; line-height: 20px; font-optical-sizing: auto; margin-bottom: 3px; margin-top: 0px;" class="ng-star-inserted"><strong style="box-sizing: border-box;" class="ng-star-inserted">Reach（覆盖范围）</strong><span style="box-sizing: border-box;" class="ng-star-inserted">：这个项目在一定时间内能影响多少用户？</span></p></li><li style="box-sizing: border-box; font-optical-sizing: auto; line-height: 20px;" class="ng-star-inserted"><p style="box-sizing: border-box; line-height: 20px; font-optical-sizing: auto; margin-bottom: 3px; margin-top: 0px;" class="ng-star-inserted"><strong style="box-sizing: border-box;" class="ng-star-inserted">Impact（影响程度）</strong><span style="box-sizing: border-box;" class="ng-star-inserted">：每个用户受到的影响有多大？（可以用 0.25 到 3 的量表评估）</span></p></li><li style="box-sizing: border-box; font-optical-sizing: auto; line-height: 20px;" class="ng-star-inserted"><p style="box-sizing: border-box; line-height: 20px; font-optical-sizing: auto; margin-bottom: 3px; margin-top: 0px;" class="ng-star-inserted"><strong style="box-sizing: border-box;" class="ng-star-inserted">Confidence（信心指数）</strong><span style="box-sizing: border-box;" class="ng-star-inserted">：你对以上评估的信心有多大？（用百分比表示）</span></p></li><li style="box-sizing: border-box; font-optical-sizing: auto; line-height: 20px;" class="ng-star-inserted"><p style="box-sizing: border-box; line-height: 20px; font-optical-sizing: auto; margin-bottom: 3px; margin-top: 0px;" class="ng-star-inserted"><strong style="box-sizing: border-box;" class="ng-star-inserted">Effort（投入精力）</strong><span style="box-sizing: border-box;" class="ng-star-inserted">：需要投入多少人/月的工作量？</span></p></li></ul>" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;overflow=hidden;rounded=0;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="3020" y="700" width="430" height="210" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="_OYYxRMqJoKIH2fyxp7o-2" value="<strong class="ng-star-inserted" style="box-sizing: border-box; color: rgb(26, 28, 30); font-family: Inter, ul.style: box-sizing: border-box; padding-left: 24px; color: rgb(26, 28, 30); font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255);

p.style: box-sizing: border-box; line-height: 20px; font-optical-sizing: auto; margin-bottom: 3px; margin-top: 0px;
p.span: ：这个项目在一定时间内能影响多少用户？

p.style: box-sizing: border-box; line-height: 20px; font-optical-sizing: auto; margin-bottom: 3px; margin-top: 0px;
p.span: ：每个用户受到的影响有多大？（可以用 0.25 到 3 的量表评估）

p.style: box-sizing: border-box; line-height: 20px; font-optical-sizing: auto; margin-bottom: 3px; margin-top: 0px;
p.span: ：你对以上评估的信心有多大？（用百分比表示）

p.style: box-sizing: border-box; line-height: 20px; font-optical-sizing: auto; margin-bottom: 3px; margin-top: 0px;
p.span: ：需要投入多少人/月的工作量？

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 358px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1322px; margin-left: 3062px;

strong.style: box-sizing: border-box; color: rgb(26, 28, 30); font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-style: normal; font-variant-ligatures: normal; font-variant-caps: normal; letter-spacing: normal; orphans: 2; text-align: start; text-indent: 0px; text-transform: none; widows: 2; word-spacing: 0px; -webkit-text-stroke-width: 0px; white-space: normal; background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); text-decoration-thickness: initial; text-decoration-style: initial; text-decoration-color: initial;
strong.span: RICE 得分 = (Reach × Impact × Confidence) / Effort
